items.title: DAIHAN (DEERS) UV & LED-UV Ink Technologies
items.desc: Developed with South Korean technology, DAIHAN (DEERS) UV and LED-UV inks deliver next-generation performance in commercial and packaging printing with instant curing, superior surface resistance, and high energy efficiency. As the Turkish representative, we combine this advanced technology with rapid application capability and uninterrupted supply power.

items.title: SAKATA INX Offset Ink Technologies
items.desc: Developed with Japanese engineering, SAKATA's offset inks deliver high efficiency, balanced print performance, and reliable quality. As the Turkish representative, we combine this performance with local technical support and application expertise.

items.title: Our Global Ink Technologies
items.desc: With ink technologies representing the advanced engineering of Japan and South Korea, we deliver high performance, reliable quality, and sustainable efficiency across different printing processes.

items.title: Technical Assurance for Uninterrupted Printing
items.desc: Our experienced technical team ensures production continuity by responding quickly and accurately to technical situations in printing houses, contributing to efficient and high-quality print processes.

items.title: EVAcolor Metallic Offset Inks
items.desc:
EVAcolor metallic offset inks are engineered for high brilliance, strong metallic effects, and balanced print performance. With carefully selected pigment structure and optimized binder system, they achieve homogeneous distribution, clear reflections, and consistent color results across different paper and cardboard surfaces.

Fast drying and high friction resistance support production efficiency while providing eye-catching and lasting visual impact in prints.

items.title: EVAcolor Fluorescent Ink Technology
items.desc:
EVAcolor fluorescent offset inks are engineered for high vibrancy, strong visibility, and eye-catching color effects. Their special pigment structure provides bright, sharp, and homogeneous color distribution on different print surfaces, highlighting the visual impact of designs.

Fast drying, stable print performance, and compatibility with post-print applications support efficiency in the production process while contributing to striking, lasting, and distinctive results in commercial and packaging printing.

items.title: High-Performance Offset Blanket Solutions
items.desc:
ST PRO DOT and SX DOT COMBI offset blankets are professional solutions developed to combine high print quality with production reliability in commercial and packaging printing. The ST PRO DOT series provides consistent and sharp print results with precise dot transfer and balanced ink transfer, while SX DOT COMBI offers broad chemical resistance and flexible usage advantages in conventional and UV printing applications with its hybrid structure.

With their long-lasting construction, stable surface performance, and technical characteristics that adapt to different printing conditions, both blanket solutions contribute to uninterrupted, predictable, and high-quality print processes while maintaining machine efficiency.

aboutPage.title: About Us

history.title: Our History
history.intro: With eco-friendly products, a commitment to quality, and ethical values, we aim to elevate our technical, logistical, and commercial services to the highest level...
history.p1: Founded in 1983 to supply paper, cardboard, and printing materials to the printing industry, Sim Baskı Malzemeleri Ltd. Şti. shifted its focus from 1998 onwards to offset printing inks, coatings, offset blankets, and offset chemicals.
history.p2: Having taken on the Turkish representation of EFI offset printing plates from the Italian Samor Group in 2001, Sim Baskı Malzemeleri has been representing SAKATA offset inks, Hi-Tech Coatings water-based and UV varnishes, Fujikura offset blankets since 2002, and DEERS (DAIHAN) inks from South Korea since 2008. From 2024, the company has taken on the Turkish representation of selected product lines from the Italian Acoma brand, continuously expanding its product portfolio and service quality.
history.p3: Today, Sim Baskı Malzemeleri offers advanced custom color solutions with a monthly production capacity of 15 tons and its registered EVAcolor brand, technically designing colors requested from digital or printed references or nature in chemical compositions suitable for pre-press and post-press applications, bringing them to life through precision manufacturing processes. Under the EVAcolor brand, fluorescent and metallic ink production is carried out while providing uninterrupted service to customers with an experienced team.
history.p4: Sim Baskı Malzemeleri carries a versatile identity as a manufacturer, supplier, and solution partner, with a strong import network through global collaborations, as well as production capabilities and export activities targeting international markets.

cookie.message: This website uses cookies to improve your experience. By continuing to use our site, you accept our cookie policy.

sections.title: 1. General Information
sections.content: At SIM Baskı Malzemeleri San. Tic. Ltd. Şti., we value the protection of your personal data. This policy explains how data collected on our website is processed.

sections.title: 2. Data Collected
sections.content: Through contact forms, we may collect your name, email, phone number, and company information. When you visit our website, technical data such as IP address, browser information, and visited pages are automatically recorded.

sections.title: 3. Purpose of Data Use
sections.content: Collected data is used to respond to your inquiries, improve our service quality, fulfill legal obligations, and communicate with you.

sections.title: 4. Cookie Policy
sections.content: Our website uses essential cookies (for site functionality), analytics cookies (for visitor statistics), and preference cookies (for language and region preferences). You can disable cookies through your browser settings, but some features may not function properly.

sections.title: 5. Data Security
sections.content: Your personal data is protected with technical and administrative measures against unauthorized access, loss, and misuse.

sections.title: 6. Third-Party Sharing
sections.content: Your personal data is not shared with third parties except where legally required. Analytics tools such as Google Analytics may be used.

sections.title: 7. Your Rights
sections.content: Under Turkish data protection law (KVKK No. 6698), you have the right to access, correct, delete, and object to the processing of your personal data. Contact us at info@simlimited.net to exercise these rights.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.content: For questions about our privacy policy, contact us at info@simlimited.net or +90 (212) 637 62 49.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance
sections.content: By using this website, you agree to the following terms of use. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use the site.

sections.title: 2. Service Description
sections.content: The SIM Baskı Malzemeleri website is designed to provide information about our products and services. Information on the site is for general informational purposes.

sections.title: 3. Intellectual Property Rights
sections.content: All content, images, logos, designs, and texts on this website belong to SIM Baskı Malzemeleri and are protected by copyright. Unauthorized use, copying, or distribution is prohibited.

sections.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: While every effort is made to ensure accuracy, the completeness and correctness of information is not guaranteed. SIM Baskı Malzemeleri cannot be held liable for direct or indirect damages arising from use of the site.

sections.title: 5. External Links
sections.content: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for their content or privacy practices.

sections.title: 6. Modifications
sections.content: SIM Baskı Malzemeleri reserves the right to modify these terms without prior notice. Current terms are always published on this page.

sections.title: 7. Governing Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Turkey. Istanbul Courts and Enforcement Offices have jurisdiction over disputes.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.content: For questions about our terms of use, contact us at info@simlimited.net or +90 (212) 637 62 49.

items.q: What types of inks do you supply?
items.a: We supply and produce offset inks (CMYK), metallic/gold inks, UV inks, PANTONE inks, fluorescent inks, and custom color inks. We offer a wide range of products with our SAKATA INX, DEERS (DAIHAN), and EVAcolor brands.

items.q: How does custom color production work?
items.a: Our custom color production consists of 4 stages: First, we receive your color reference (Pantone code, printed sample, or nature sample). Then we create an ink recipe using L-A-B digital formulation. We print samples on different papers and grammages, and after your approval, we proceed to mass production.

items.q: What is the minimum order quantity?
items.a: The minimum order quantity for custom color production varies by product type. Please contact our sales team for detailed information.
We can deliver stock products on the same day or next day. For custom color productions, we typically deliver within 1-3 business days after sample approval.

Yes, our experienced technical team can provide on-site intervention for technical issues at your printing facility. We offer free consultation on ink settings, color calibration, and print optimization.

items.q: Which brands do you work with?
items.a: We are the Turkish distributor for SAKATA INX (Japan), DEERS/DAIHAN (South Korea), Hi-Tech Coatings (Netherlands), Zeller+Gmelin (Germany), Baltink (Lithuania), and Stahl (Netherlands). EVAcolor and VECTOR are our own brands.

matbaaMalzemeleri.title: Printing Materials: Comprehensive Guide & Products
matbaaMalzemeleri.subtitle: Turkey's trusted supplier for offset ink, metallic gold, UV ink, blankets and printing chemicals
matbaaMalzemeleri.description: Turkey's leading printing materials supplier since 1983 — offering offset ink, metallic gold ink, UV ink, PANTONE colors, printing blankets and chemicals.
matbaaMalzemeleri.section1Text: Printing materials encompass all inks, blankets, varnishes and chemicals used in offset, digital and flexo printing processes. High-quality printing materials directly affect color accuracy and press stability. As the official Turkish distributor for world-leading brands, SIM Printing Supplies provides solutions for every sector need.
matbaaMalzemeleri.categoryOffsetDesc: SAKATA INX CMYK offset inks deliver high color density, excellent press stability and fast drying — the essential solution for commercial printing.
matbaaMalzemeleri.categoryMetalicDesc: The EVA COLOR gold and silver metallic ink range creates stunning foil effects on high-gloss coated papers — ideal for packaging and premium print.
matbaaMalzemeleri.categoryUVDesc: Zeller+Gmelin UV offset inks offer instant UV curing, superior rub resistance and excellent adhesion on plastic and metal substrates.
matbaaMalzemeleri.categoryPantoneDesc: SAKATA INX PANTONE spot color inks reproduce your brand identity colors on press with Delta-E < 1.5 color accuracy.
matbaaMalzemeleri.categoryBlanketDesc: VECTOR printing blankets provide long service life, consistent ink transfer and stable print quality — tailored solutions for your offset press.
matbaaMalzemeleri.categoryChemicalsDesc: Hi-Tech Coatings dispersion varnishes and coating chemicals protect the print surface, add gloss and improve ink resistance.
matbaaMalzemeleri.reason2: Official Turkish distributor for SAKATA INX, Zeller+Gmelin, Hi-Tech Coatings and more
matbaaMalzemeleri.reason4: On-site technical support and color calibration service
matbaaMalzemeleri.reason5: Products conforming to ISO 2846-1 and EuPIA standards
matbaaMalzemeleri.ctaTitle: Get a Quote for Printing Materials
matbaaMalzemeleri.ctaText: Our expert team provides tailored solutions for your needs. Get in touch today.

istanbulSeo.title: Printing Materials Supplier in Istanbul
istanbulSeo.subtitle: Same-day delivery from our Beylikdüzü warehouse to any point in Istanbul
istanbulSeo.introTitle: Reliable Supply for Istanbul's Printing Industry
istanbulSeo.introText: SIM Printing Supplies delivers offset ink, metallic gold ink, UV ink, printing blankets and chemical products to Istanbul printers from its central warehouse in Beylikdüzü. With over 40 years of experience, we remain the indispensable supplier for Istanbul's printing sector.
istanbulSeo.address: Yakuplu, 194. Sk. No:1 D:176, Beylikdüzü, Istanbul
istanbulSeo.service2: On-site technical support and ink calibration
istanbulSeo.service3: Custom color (spot color) production and formulation
istanbulSeo.service4: ICC profile creation and print standardization
istanbulSeo.service5: Full stock advisory for all inks and printing materials
istanbulSeo.whyIstanbulTitle: The SIM Difference in Istanbul Printing
istanbulSeo.whyIstanbulText: Istanbul is the heart of Turkey's printing and publishing industry. Hundreds of commercial printers, packaging facilities and digital print centers operate in this city. From our Beylikdüzü base, SIM Printing Supplies offers fast logistics and technical support to every district of Istanbul — serving everyone from large-scale facilities on the European side to small print shops on the Asian side with equal dedication.
istanbulSeo.ctaTitle: Call Us for Printing Materials in Istanbul
istanbulSeo.ctaText: Contact our sales team for fast delivery and technical support.
